cover.title: a demo and production are different sports
cover.sub: most ai pilots die in the gap between them. here's what never shows up in the demo.

pairs.broke: a demo runs once, on a clean path you chose
pairs.fix: production runs constantly, on messy paths you didn't

slides.title: what a demo never shows
items: stale context: agents citing docs you deleted months ago
silent failures: green checks, quietly wrong output
two agents editing one file, undoing each other
agents that can't explain what they just did

slides.title: the real question
slides.body: not 'did it work once?' but 'will it run unattended, signed off by the seniors who own the system?'

cta.title: where pilots die
cta.sub: in the gap between a clean demo and your messy production. that gap is the whole problem.
